subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-10-29 in Akka
subcodes.first_line: King Kavous was a man of pride and arrogance. Siyavash was more favored than he. Kavoús took to wife the daughter of the King of Yemen, and cherished her with exceeding love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شاه کاووس مرد متکبری بود.  سیاوش از او مقبول تر است.  کاووس دختر پادشاه یمن را گرفت و او را خیلی دوست داشت
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @justice and wrath of God
